title: Floating Vaulting Updraft close: substrate local instance strict-data-ready
body: Closed the owner-directed memory/state local-instance slice: strict manifest/schema are present, 22 surface rows carry required fields, 114 legacy comms/events fragments were collision-checked, parse-checked, ledgered, and migrated into canonical comms-events, and Phase 3 immune-layer responsibilities are routed. Doctor remains queued until validation/review closure; no practice:substrate scripts were added.
